title: Fear me! (not)
description: Mod which allowed players not to fear mobs has returned!
body:
Original idea and implementation of this mod for 1.7.10 belongs to **Ilya Pirogov**! 
 
In two words: this mod allows players to be included in a special list, causing mobs to flee on sight! Great for people who prefer building over fighting. :D

Mod doesn't need to be installed client-side (if not for some reason, please let me know).

In-game config is available with commands:

**/fearme** (or **/fearmenot**):

*add <online_player_name>*

- adds the specified player to the list of "Feared Ones"

 
*remove <online_player_name>*

- removes the specified player from the list of "Feared Ones"

 
*enable*

- enables the mod features

 
*disable*

- disables the mod features

 
*reload*

- reload mod configuration from config file.

 
*list*

- just for testing purposes: displays the list of "Feared Ones" UUIDs.
